English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Gordon Martin papers
Martin, Gordon
7305
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
circa 1960-1985. Short stories, films, videotapes, and publicity materials. The collection consists of material of a homoerotic nature assembled by Gordon Martin, and includes typescripts and photocopies of erotic/pornographic short prose fictions; catalogs and brochures of mail order enterprises; and erotic and pornographic films. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 74 76 78 80 ======= 74 76 78 80 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2086427
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
P. McCray
Date completed:
November 1991
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2003Sarah Keen, March 2008
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
The collection consists of material of a homoerotic nature assembled by Gordon Martin, and includes typescripts and photocopies of erotic/pornographic short prose fictions, a few of which are illustrated with drawings or photographs; catalogs and brochures of mail order enterprises dealing in erotica and pornography; and erotic and pornographic films.
RELATED MATERIALS
Collecting program: Human Sexuality Collection
Cite As:
Gordon Martin papers, #7305. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Pornography. Erotica. Homosexuality and literature. Homosexuality in motion pictures.
